name: opencode-worktree-guardian
description: Codex adapter for Guardian worktree safety hooks and commands.

interface.shortDescription: Guard Codex git/worktree workflows from unsafe destructive actions.
interface.longDescription: Worktree Guardian reuses the Guardian safety engine to block unsafe shell/git commands in Codex hooks and provides skill-driven command wrappers for Guardian workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run guardian done in plan mode
